response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: r4c5 is critically below the 0.4 SoC threshold at 0.22, urgent request aligns with balanced sharing policy, and 0.5 kWh allocation supports geographic priority-to-neediest coordination without depleting our reserves.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.4, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Three neighbors in acute distress; r4c5 critically low at 22% SoC and requesting urgent aid; geographic round-robin with priority to most-needy is the only viable coordination mechanism..
